content:
✨ claudecodeui | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified, accessible, and feature-rich graphical user interface for managing and interacting with multiple AI code assistants across different devices.
✨ Key Features: • Responsive Design (Desktop, Tablet, Mobile) • Interactive Chat Interface • Integrated Shell Terminal • File Explorer with Syntax Highlighting and Live Editing • Git Explorer (View, Stage, Commit, Branch)
📖 Summary: CloudCLI (Claude Code UI) provides a user-friendly web and mobile interface for interacting with various AI code assistants like Claude Code, Cursor CLI, Codex, and Gemini. It allows users to manage projects, sessions, and code directly through a graphical interface, accessible locally or remotely.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
